title: Stablecoin infrastructure firm Trace Finance raises $32 million Series A, says valuation grew 10x from seed
message_html: Stablecoin infrastructure firm Trace Finance raises $32 million Series A, says valuation grew 10x from seed ...
snippet: CoinFund led the round, with Coinbase Ventures, Haun Ventures, Jump Capital, Paxos, Chainlink Labs and others participating.
